criteria.text: 24h cache: a successful /api/reports read is served from cache on reload within 24h without re-reading the workbook
Force-refresh: GET /api/reports?refresh=1 bypasses the cache, re-reads the workbook, and replaces the cached payload
Per-session cache: each visitor session caches its report separately (session-scoped key); never cross-served
Errors not cached: a failed/empty read (401/not-set-up/upstream error) caches nothing; a later request re-attempts
Audit only on the actual read: a cache hit emits no workbook-read audit; the read audit fires only on a real upstream read (miss or refresh)
Refresh button on Reports re-fetches with refresh=1 and updates the view
